titleStmt.title: SII 26.170: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 170. (A.R. No. 159 of 1909.) SAṄGRĀMANALLŪR, UDUMALAIPET TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: Same base, in the same place as above.

p.hi: [H2oysaḷa] Sōmēśvaradēva: Śaka 1[2]65, wrong for 1165 Subhānu = c. 1243-44 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription is damaged in some places. It is dated Śaka 1265, Śubhānu Tai-śu, 11 Kārttigai is wrong for 1165 Śaka year.

It refers to the Mahāpradhāna Kettaya-[daṇṇāyakkaṉ] son of the Mahāpradhāna Mādappa-daṇṇāyakkaṉ who was probably a feudatory of the Hoysaḷa king [Vīra-Sō]mēśvara. It records the grant of land to Brāhmaṇas by Kettayadaṉṉāyakkaṉ probably for the victory and prosperity of his brother Siṅgayadaṇṇāyakaṉ and for the achievement of his own desired ends. The gift land was probably situated in Oṭṭaikkumīṇḍāṉ in Karaivaḻi-nāḍu in Koṅgu-maṇḍala. A certain Kaṇṇappaṉ Teṉṉavadaraiyaṉ, the uḍaiyāṉ of Śeḻuvaṉūr is mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī . śakābdam 1000 2 100 6 10 5 mel cellāniṉṟa subhānu samvatsarattu Uttarāyaṇasam kkiḻamai kāttikaiyum pūrvvapakṣattu Ekādaśiyum śubhayogamum peṟṟa Immahāuttarāyaṇa makarasaṅkrān=ti nāḷ svasti meśvaradevar prathivirājyam paṇṇiyaruḷāniṉṟa svastiśrī śitakaragaṇḍairājyalakṣmirākṣāpratāra pāṇḍyayāṭīmukhavikaṭana caraṇāgatavajjrapajera Allāḷanāditha davya śrīpādapatmārāyaka muṭīkulayakamalamāttāṇḍa nilagiri sādhāraṇaṉ śrīmaṉu mahāpradhāna mātappa deṇṇāyakkar jyeṣṭha kumārarāṉa śrīmaṉu mahāpradhānan kettaya Uṭai
yakkaṟku vijayātbhudayaṅkaḷākavum nammuṭaiyasakalābhīṣṭha Inta brāhmaṇaṟku patraśāsana m ceḻuvaṉūruṭaiyāṉ kaṇṇappaṉ teṉṉavataraiyaṉ koṅkumaṇṭalattu karaivaḻi Amaranāṭṭu teṉ muṟ śrīcamadthyasthaparikalpitamāṉa krayadravya Ellām sākalyena Āvaṇakkaḷariyile kāṭam kaiccilavaṟac cilavaṟuttu Inta sabhaiyār pakkal Udakapūrvvamākavum pramāṇapūrvamākavum koṇṭuṭaiyaṉāṉa Itteṉṉavataraiyaṉ Inta Oṭṭaikkumiṇṭāṉi koṇṭuṭaiyaṉāṉa puravu kālukkum Itukkuḷḷa samastaprāptiyum karam kaḻittu sarvamānyamāka Udakapūrvvamāka gātra
vaittukkuṭuttom kuṭutta Inta grāmanammāṇam paṇṇukaikku ka taṭantunāṉṟum paṭṭakiḻaik kallāpura turvedimaṅgalattu Aṭaippāṉ catussimaiyum Inta kālapurakovilu Ā kuṭiyiruppu nattam nirurimai nirmānilai turavu manṟumippuravopāti samastaprāptikaḷum Inta nilam ceṉnel karumpu ceṅkaḻunir vāḻai koḻuntu teṅku kamuku mañcaḷiñci maṟṟum tām veṇṭiṉa payirum ceytu tāmveṇṭiṉa Iṭaṅka kuṭiyeṟṟikkoṇṭu Aṉupavippārkaḷākavum Inta nilattālluḷ siddhāyam poṉvari l ṉiyokam veṭi
Digital edition of SII 26.170 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
